scripts.text:
--DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION

UPDATE TGT
SET TGT.UNI_CallResult = REF.UnifiedValue
FROM  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION] TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.CallResult = REF.TableColumnValue
AND REF.TableName = 'DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION'
AND REF.Division = TGT.Division
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='FIVE9'
AND MT.TableColumnName='CallResult'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_FIVE9_PRODUCT

UPDATE TGT
SET TGT.UNI_ProductName = REF.UnifiedValue
FROM  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_PRODUCT] TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.ProductName = REF.TableColumnValue
AND REF.TableName = 'DIM_FIVE9_PRODUCT'
AND REF.Division = TGT.Division
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_FIVE9_PRODUCT' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='FIVE9'
AND MT.TableColumnName='ProductName'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';



UPDATE P
SET P.UNI_ProductName = UN_PR.UNI_ProductName
FROM ZML.DIM_FIVE9_PRODUCT P
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT DISTINCT Division,ProductName,UNI_ProductName 
	FROM  [ZML].[DIM_PRODUCT] 
	WHERE UNI_ProductName IS NOT NULL AND ProductName IS NOT NULL AND ProductName!='') UN_PR
ON P.ProductName = UN_PR.ProductName
AND P.Division = UN_PR.Division
WHERE UN_PR.UNI_ProductName IS NOT NULL;

--In sync with LP

UPDATE TGT
SET TGT.UNI_Market = BR_LP.UNI_Market,
TGT.UNI_MarketGroup = BR_LP.UNI_MarketGroup
FROM  [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_MARKET] TGT
JOIN
(
SELECT DISTINCT Division,LP_BRanchID,ShortName,UNI_Market,UNI_MarketGroup 
FROM ZML.DIM_BRANCH
WHERE ShortName IS NOT NULL AND ShortName!=''
) BR_LP
ON  TGT.Market = BR_LP.LP_BRanchID
AND TGT.Division = BR_LP.Division
WHERE BR_LP.UNI_Market IS NOT NULL;
